name: manychat-openai-lead-qualifier-blueprint
description: Conceptual Make scenario layout. Build it manually inside Make.

modules.purpose: Receive data from ManyChat external request
Normalize buyer vs agent payload and build prompt context
POST to https://api.openai.com/v1/responses with structured JSON output
Return reply_text, status, extracted fields, and note back to ManyChat

notes: Use a shared secret in the incoming webhook body.
Keep the webhook response module at the end.
If you expect many parallel leads, consider sequential processing only when order matters.
